A general is a high-ranking officer in the military, typically commanding large units or multiple service branches. In the U.S. Army, it is the fifth highest rank, below general of the army. Generals oversee large operations and strategic planning. Sources: https://www.dictionary.com/browse/general, https://dictionary.cambridge.org/us/dictionary/english/general, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/General_(United_States), https://www.vocabulary.com/dictionary/general, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/General_officer
